_meta.label: Solid Protocol
_meta.summary: Decentralized CDP stablecoin protocol on Terra. Issues SOLID (stablecoin); CAPA is the governance/utility token; ampCAPA is the Eris-amplified CAPA LST. Also operates the Atrium NFT marketplace and DeFi games.

facts.claim: SOLID is a decentralized stablecoin (CDP-backed) issued by Solid Protocol, targeting a 1:1 USD peg. In our pricing it should read near $1.00 across sources.
facts.notes: Observed SOLID ~$1.00-1.008 across 4 sources, grade 100. Canonical doc link to confirm.

facts.claim: CAPA is Solid Protocol's governance/utility token. ampCAPA is the Eris-amplified (auto-compounding) version of CAPA, with its own hub exchange rate.
ampCAPA's current on-chain hub exchange rate (CAPA per ampCAPA).
facts.notes: ampCAPA uses the Eris Amplifier mechanism; ratio rises with CAPA staking yield. Never hardcode.

facts.claim: Solid Protocol operates the Atrium NFT marketplace (a sub-product), plus DeFi games, within the aDAO ecosystem.
